chunks.title: Introduction to Blood Work
chunks.summary: The speaker discusses the importance of fasting insulin and the need for comprehensive blood work. He shares his own experiences with blood tests, emphasizing how it can provide proof of health for those following an animal-based diet.
chunks.transcript: I've heard from some of you in the past that even asking your doctor for a fasting insulin which is perhaps the single most important test that I think everyone should be getting is denied and I just don't understand that on this week's podcast I wanted to share my most recent set of blood work I've done blood work four times in the last two years and I haven't done it in about a year usually I try and do blood work every six months but I missed one so I've got a comprehensive set of blood work for you guys here I'm going to walk you through it tell you what I ordered why I order it how to interpret it and how you can get your own blood work so you're not dependent on your doctor all these kind of things so I like showing my

chunks.title: Importance of Detailed Blood Work
chunks.summary: He expresses frustration over the limited blood tests commonly ordered by physicians and explains why detailed blood work is necessary for better health insights. The speaker reflects on past work experiences and the significance of testing various health markers.
chunks.transcript: blood work I think it's an opening of the kimono it's proof as in the pudding you get to see how healthy I am with an animal- based diet a lot of the questions people have a lot of the criticisms people have of eating this way are answered with labs to show that I'm healthy that I'm doing great with this diet so enjoy this podcast showing my most recent set of blood work all right guys time to share my most recent set of blood work I share this with you every time I get blood work it's not meant to be overwhelming in technicalities it's just meant to be a guide of the kind of stuff that I look for when I get my blood work I'm getting pretty darn comprehensive blood work for myself I don't think you need all of these things but I do think that basically everything I'm getting in this set of blood work is valuable and helps me sort of navigate how I'm doing with my overall health I think that if more Physicians ordered blood work for their patients at the level of detail that you'll see in this presentation I think we would see a lot of issues come up that are often missed in patients I remember previously when when I was working in the hospital and outpatient clinics as a PA and Cardiology and then as a physician doing kind of Lifestyle Integrative Medicine it was not uncommon to see most Physicians just order a CBC and a chem7 or a CBC and a comprehensive metabolic

chunks.title: Overview of Recent Blood Work
chunks.summary: The speaker prepares to present his most recent blood work results and emphasizes transparency in sharing health data. He notes the consistency of this blood work with previous tests and anticipates discussing the results in detail.
chunks.transcript: time if you go to the doctor that's about all they're going to check they're going to check a CBC they might check a comprehensive metabolic panel they might just get a basic metabolic panel and they'll check your cholesterol and as you'll see I always check far more detailed blood work than that and I've talked about my blood work in the past this is the fourth podcast I've done sharing my blood work I will link in the description to the previous podcast if you really want to see all of my old blood work but I don't think there's a real reason to this set of blood work looks very similar as I will talk about throughout the presentation this set of blood work looks pretty similar to those as I'll talk about in this podcast but I've shared my blood work from August of 2022 November of 2022 March of 2023 and now this blood work was obtained at the end of February in 2024 I like to get blood work about every six months but in this case this full panel was about a year between the last time I got it so let's jump in and I will show you guys

chunks.summary: He elaborates on the components of a Complete Blood Count, highlighting the significance of various metrics such as red blood cells and white blood cells. He reassures that his results indicate no current health issues.

chunks.title: Conclusion and Recommendations
chunks.summary: In the concluding segment, the speaker discusses the importance of quality food choices and sharing personal health data. He provides resources for obtaining blood work independently from medical professionals.
